_meta.notes: ColumnPseudoAnonymizer — doc enumerates 4 inputs: column(s), algorithm (SHA-256/SHA-512/MD5), pepper (static), salt column.
_meta.expected_xfail: Catalog param drift (finding #2 in _findings.md) — lib only declares 'column' + 'method'; 'algorithm', 'pepper', 'saltColumn' all missing. Round-trip preserves whatever params come in (params is a free-form dict), so this PASSES on the (de)serializer side; the drift is in the catalog, not the wire layer. Kept as a regression sentinel.
